message:
feat: align bd preflight --check with CI checks (GH#2230)

Add formatting check (gofmt -l) and .beads/issues.jsonl pollution
check. Expand version sync to use scripts/check-versions.sh with
fallback to inline logic. Preflight now runs 6 checks matching CI.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
